qa/qa-strategy.description: Test strategy documents, coverage matrices, and risk-based prioritization

qa/qa-metrics.description: Quality dashboards, defect density, escape rate, and trend reporting

pm/write-prd.description: Write a Product Requirements Document from a brief or problem statement

pm/write-user-stories.description: Convert requirements into user stories with acceptance criteria

pm/prioritization.description: Prioritize a backlog using RICE or MoSCoW scoring

pm/okr-writer.description: Write measurable OKRs from strategic goals or intent

pm/competitive-analysis.description: Structure a competitive analysis for a feature, product, or market

pm/feature-spec.description: Write a concise feature spec one-pager for engineering handoff

pm/product-discovery.description: Run structured product discovery to identify what to build before building it

pm/team-brief.description: Write an empowered team brief that gives engineers a problem to solve, not a solution to build

pm/outcome-vs-output.description: Audit a roadmap or backlog to distinguish outcomes from outputs and escape the build trap

pm/retention-design.description: Design habit-forming product features using the Hook Model

pm/experiment-design.description: Design product experiments using build-measure-learn loops and validated learning

pm/product-market-fit.description: Assess and improve product-market fit using the PMF pyramid

engineer/code-review.description: Review code for quality, bugs, and design issues using Clean Code principles. Use when asked to review code, do a code review, check a PR, review a diff, or assess code quality.

engineer/debug.description: Debug systematically using reproduce-isolate-fix methodology. Use when encountering a bug, unexpected behavior, test failure, or error that needs diagnosis.

engineer/write-tests.description: Write unit and integration tests using TDD red-green-refactor cycle. Use when asked to write tests, add test coverage, or test a function or module.

engineer/tech-debt.description: Document, scope, and prioritize technical debt using Feathers' seam-finding approach. Use when assessing legacy code, planning refactors, or making a case for paying down tech debt.

engineer/api-design.description: Design clean, consistent REST or GraphQL APIs using deep module principles. Use when designing API endpoints, reviewing API contracts, or creating API documentation.

engineer/pr-description.description: Write clear, reviewable pull request descriptions that communicate what changed and why. Use when opening a PR, writing a commit message, or documenting a code change.

designer/design-critique.description: Critique a design for usability, hierarchy, and accessibility using Don Norman's principles. Use when reviewing screens, flows, mockups, or UI designs.

designer/ux-audit.description: Audit a user flow for friction and drop-off points using Krug's usability principles. Use when analyzing a user journey, onboarding flow, or feature flow for usability problems.

designer/component-spec.description: Write a component spec for engineering handoff using Atomic Design principles. Use when handing off a UI component to engineering, documenting a design system component, or speccing a new component.

designer/design-system-doc.description: Document a design system component with usage rules, tokens, and examples using Atomic Design principles. Use when building or maintaining a design system.

devops/incident-response.description: Structure and run an incident response using SRE principles. Use when a production incident occurs, a service is degraded, or on-call engineer needs to run a structured response.

devops/runbook.description: Write an operational runbook for a service or on-call procedure using SRE standards. Use when documenting how to operate, troubleshoot, or respond to alerts for a service.

devops/deployment-checklist.description: Run a pre and post-deployment checklist to reduce change failure rate. Use when deploying to production, planning a release, or reviewing deployment readiness.

devops/postmortem.description: Write a blameless postmortem after a production incident using human factors principles. Use when conducting a post-incident review, learning from an outage, or documenting what happened and why.

qa/risk-based-testing.description: Allocate testing effort based on risk and likelihood of failure using Google's SET/SWE/TE model

qa/exploratory-testing.description: Run structured exploratory testing sessions using charters, timeboxing, and heuristics

leadership/team-health-check.description: Assess team health using the Five Dysfunctions model across trust, conflict, commitment, accountability, and results

leadership/feedback-delivery.description: Deliver feedback using Radical Candor's care personally + challenge directly framework

leadership/one-on-one.description: Run structured 1:1s with direct reports using Manager's Path and High Output Management frameworks

leadership/leadership-transition.description: Navigate a leadership role transition using the First 90 Days 30/60/90 framework

leadership/team-multiplier.description: Assess and shift your leadership style from Diminisher to Multiplier using Liz Wiseman's framework

leadership/psychological-safety.description: Build psychological safety in your team using Leaders Eat Last Circle of Safety model

program-delivery-manager/dependency-mapp.description: Surface and visualize hidden dependencies blocking delivery using Making Work Visible (DeGrandis)

program-delivery-manager/release-plannin.description: Build a velocity-based release roadmap with risk buffers using Agile Estimating and Planning (Cohn)

program-delivery-manager/delivery-risk-r.description: Identify, score, and mitigate delivery risks using The Phoenix Project and The Art of Project Management

program-delivery-manager/program-status-.description: Write a structured weekly or bi-weekly program status report with RAG status, blockers, and decisions needed

program-delivery-manager/milestone-scopi.description: Scope a milestone to a fixed time window with variable scope using Shape Up and The Art of Project Management

program-delivery-manager/flow-metrics-re.description: Analyze cycle time, WIP, throughput, and DORA metrics to identify delivery bottlenecks

founder/customer-discovery.description: Run structured customer discovery interviews using The Mom Test to surface real problems without leading the witness

founder/pitch-narrative.description: Craft a compelling startup pitch narrative using Zero to One's secret-first framework

founder/investor-update.description: Write a structured monthly or quarterly investor update with wins, struggles, and specific asks

founder/business-model-canvas.description: Design and stress-test a business model canvas using Lean Startup build-measure-learn loops

founder/fundraising-email.description: Write a cold investor outreach email using Traction's traction-first framing

data-scientist/eda-report.description: Run structured exploratory data analysis and produce an audit report with quality findings and recommended treatments

data-scientist/data-story.description: Communicate data insights to non-technical stakeholders using Storytelling with Data's conclusion-first narrative structure

data-scientist/feature-engineering.description: Design and implement features from raw data including encoding, transformations, interactions, and leakage prevention

data-scientist/model-card.description: Document a machine learning model with performance metrics, subgroup analysis, failure modes, and monitoring plan

marketing/messaging-framework.description: Build a brand messaging framework and homepage copy using StoryBrand's customer-as-hero structure

marketing/campaign-brief.description: Write a marketing campaign brief with One Metric That Matters, audience definition, and channel plan using Lean Analytics

marketing/growth-experiment.description: Design and document a channel growth experiment using Traction's Bullseye Framework with pre-committed success thresholds

marketing/customer-persona.description: Build a buyer persona anchored to buying context, trigger, and job-to-be-done using Obviously Awesome's framework

sales/discovery-call.description: Structure a sales discovery call using SPIN Selling's situation, problem, implication, and need-payoff question sequence

sales/deal-qualification.description: Qualify a deal using the MEDDIC framework to assess metrics, economic buyer, decision criteria, and champion

sales/sales-proposal.description: Write a compelling sales proposal using The Challenger Sale's teach-tailor-take-control structure

sales/objection-handling.description: Handle sales objections using Never Split the Difference's tactical empathy and labeling techniques

sales/account-plan.description: Build a strategic account plan identifying key players, buying influences, and expansion paths using Miller Heiman's framework

customer-success/qbr-deck.description: Build a structured Quarterly Business Review deck: value delivered, health score, goals vs actuals, next 90-day plan

customer-success/churn-risk-analysis.description: Analyze customer health signals, identify churn risk flags, and generate an intervention playbook

customer-success/escalation-playbook.description: De-escalate a customer crisis using acknowledge-triage-DRI-cadence-resolution framework

customer-success/health-scorecard.description: Build a customer health scorecard across usage, engagement, adoption, NPS, support load, and financial risk

customer-success/onboarding-plan.description: Design a 100-day customer onboarding plan with phase gates from Never Lose a Customer Again

customer-success/expansion-discovery.description: Identify expansion signals and structure upsell or cross-sell conversations using land-and-expand principles

recruiter/job-description.description: Write a performance-based job description using Hire With Your Head outcomes model

recruiter/interview-scorecard.description: Build a structured interview scorecard using the Who method: outcomes, competencies, A/B/C rubric

recruiter/candidate-debrief.description: Run a structured post-interview debrief meeting with calibration protocol and hire/no-hire framework

consultant/exec-summary.description: Write an executive summary using Pyramid Principle SCQA structure: Situation, Complication, Question, Answer

consultant/issue-tree.description: Decompose a problem MECE using issue trees, generate hypotheses, and prioritize branches for investigation

consultant/status-report.description: Write a structured client status report with RAG status, accomplishments, blockers, decisions needed, and next steps
